checks.criterion: Task brief, schema, and write boundary were followed.

checks.criterion: D-0003 source-root approval is recorded and bounded.

checks.criterion: Read-only inventory outputs exist and are internally count-consistent.
checks.evidence: manifests/all_projects_inventory_summary.json reports root C:\Users\alex1\OneDrive\Desktop\All Projects, source_root_id SRC-ALL-PROJECTS, hash_files true, inspect_workbooks true, file_count 7400, active_year_file_count 606, workbook_sheet_rows 4231, active_year_sheet_rows 446, and project_count 404. CSV imports found 7400 all-project file rows, 606 active-year file rows, 4231 all-project workbook/sheet rows, 446 active-year workbook/sheet rows, and 405 project-manifest rows including one UNASSIGNED aggregation row; excluding UNASSIGNED leaves 404 project rows matching the summary. reports/source_inventory_summary.md states the inventory is manifest evidence only, does not approve a generator bundle, and does not start a real-project baseline.

checks.criterion: Inventory preserves generator boundary and forbidden-source classification posture.

All 7400 all-project file rows and all 606 active-year rows had sha256 values. Top roles include forbidden_production_control_file 2006, completed_sheetmetal_drawing_reference 1860, forbidden_electrical_drawing 1008, and completed target reference roles, showing target-like material was classified as forbidden/reference rather than generator evidence.

checks.criterion: Generator eligibility summary explicitly requires fail-closed behavior.
checks.evidence: reports/generator_eligibility_summary.md states no real project is generator-eligible yet, lists file-level FORBIDDEN 5001, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED 2399, ALLOWED 0 and worksheet-level FORBIDDEN 2092, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED 2139, ALLOWED 0, and says the generator bundle builder must continue to fail closed until a project has explicitly approved files and worksheets in a positive manifest. Project-manifest grouping found statuses WORKSHEET_REVIEW_REQUIRED 366, REFERENCE_COMPLETE_WORKSHEET_REVIEW_REQUIRED 26, and NO_APPROVED_WORKSHEETS 13 for the all-project manifest, with no generator-ready status.

checks.criterion: No-baseline boundary remains in force in the audited inputs.

summary: PASS. D-0003 is recorded as an accepted user-approved source-root update for SRC-ALL-PROJECTS with read-only policy and no automatic generator-bundle approval. The D-0003 inventory outputs are present, hashed, and count-consistent; file and worksheet manifests contain zero ALLOWED generator entries and preserve a fail-closed posture. Phase 0 harness and child-result validation outputs pass. The audited inputs preserve the no-real-project-baseline boundary. This audit did not inspect forbidden paths by design.
